project_type: React 18 + Vite SPA with Firebase backend
build_command: npm run build (cannot run in sandbox - INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network)
verification_instructions: AST/syntax validation only since npm is unavailable. Verify files are well-formed JSX/JS.
setup_instructions: User runs npm install locally then npm run dev. Deploy via Vercel GitHub integration.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - cannot install npm packages, cannot run build/dev commands. All code must be generated as source files. No external HTTP calls possible.
contribution_requirements: All source files in src/. Vite config at root. Environment variables prefixed with VITE_.
key_patterns: React functional components with hooks. Firebase Firestore for real-time data via onSnapshot. Cloudinary for media uploads. AuthContext provides currentUser/userProfile. useFirestore.js has useCollection/useDocument hooks. iOS liquid glass UI with backdrop-filter blur, gradient backgrounds, and glassmorphism cards. Mobile-first 480px max-width layout.
directory_structure: src/ contains all source. src/pages/ for route components. src/components/ for shared UI. src/contexts/ for React context providers. src/hooks/ for custom hooks. src/services/ for Firestore helpers. src/styles/ for CSS. src/utils/ for utilities.
